positive: An elegant, stylized line art illustration of a pair of celestial deer (cervus celestialis), depicted mid-leap across a crescent moon. The style is neo-tribal mixed with mystical botanical etchings, rendered in deep indigo, ethereal silver, and subtle gold leaf accents. The silhouette must be clean and impactful, maximizing negative space for print contrast. The deer's antlers should intertwine with stylized lunar flora and constellations, forming a symmetrical, visually balanced composition suitable for center chest apparel printing. Use strong, sharp linework and high contrast, minimal shading, highly detailed edges, graphic novel quality, vector art aesthetic, isolated on a pure white background.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, watermarks, text, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad drawing, noise, jpeg artifacts, grayscale, overly complex, photorealism
